eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Chisago, MN; at 9:45 AM on JUN 5, 2026 Effective until 11:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
CANCEL CANCEL CANCEL CANCEL CANCEL CANCEL

CHISAGO COUNTY TO SURROUNDING AREAS. THE LAST ALERT WAS IN ERROR AND WE ARE NOT HAVING A WEATHER EMERGENCY. PLEASE CANCEL THANK YOU AND APOLOGIES FOR INCONVENIENCES

THERE IS A MALE WITH A FEL WARRANT THAT FLED FROM THE HARRIS AREA ON FOOT THAT WE ARE ATTEMPTING TO LOCATE.. PLEASE IGNORE PREVIOUS MESSAGE. CONTACT CHISAGO CO DISPATCH AT 651.257.4100 WITH ANY QUESTIONS
